title: PHP Built-in Functions
content:
### PHP Built-in Functions

PHP has over 1000 built-in functions available for various tasks.

### String Functions

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `strlen()` | String length |
| `strpos()` | Find position of substring |
| `substr()` | Extract substring |
| `str_replace()` | Replace text |
| `strtolower()` / `strtoupper()` | Change case |
| `trim()` | Remove whitespace |
| `explode()` / `implode()` | Split / Join strings |

### Array Functions

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `count()` | Count elements |
| `array_merge()` | Merge arrays |
| `array_map()` | Apply callback to each element |
| `array_filter()` | Filter array by callback |
| `array_reduce()` | Reduce array to single value |

```php
<?php
// String
$text = "Hello World";
echo strlen($text);         // 11
echo strpos($text, "World"); // 6
echo strtolower($text);     // hello world

// Array
$numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
$squared = array_map(fn($n) => $n ** 2, $numbers);
$even = array_filter($numbers, fn($n) => $n % 2 == 0);
?>
```

### Math, Date, File Functions

| Category | Examples |
|----------|----------|
| Math | `abs()`, `round()`, `max()`, `min()`, `rand()` |
| Date/Time | `date()`, `time()`, `strtotime()` |
| File | `fopen()`, `fwrite()`, `fread()`, `file_get_contents()` |
| JSON | `json_encode()`, `json_decode()` |

> **Key Point:** PHP functions are not case-sensitive, but it is best practice to call them as defined in the documentation.
codeExample:
<?php
// Array map/filter/reduce
$nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6];

$even = array_filter($nums, fn($n) => $n % 2 == 0);
$doubled = array_map(fn($n) => $n * 2, $even);
$sum = array_reduce($doubled, fn($carry, $n) => $carry + $n, 0);

print_r($even);   // [2, 4, 6]
print_r($doubled); // [4, 8, 12]
echo $sum;         // 24
?>

quiz.question: What does array_map() do?
options: Applies a callback to each element

quiz.question: Which function removes whitespace from string start and end?
